name: memory-map
description: A complete memory loop for Claude — snapshot, recall, and prune project context across sessions. Three skills bundled as one plugin.
author: Shandar Junaid · Affordance Design Studio

skills.name: memory-map
skills.description: Snapshot project context to persistent memory at session close.

skills.name: memory-recall
skills.description: Load and summarise stored memory at session start or on demand.

skills.name: memory-prune
skills.description: Clean stale, redundant, or outdated entries from memory store.
